title: MIKU totem
description: 该材质包将游戏中的不死图腾改为初音未来主题样式，采用其标志性蓝绿色调This texture pack changes the in-game undead totem to a Hatsune Miku-themed style, using her signature blue-green color scheme.
body: ![MIKU](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b6f532b63f1f97e927adc44e1c18e87f928a56c.png)该材质包将游戏中的不死图腾改为初音未来主题样式，采用其标志性蓝绿色调This texture pack changes the in-game undead totem to a Hatsune Miku-themed style, using her signature blue-green color scheme.
